member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureDefinition
member.summary: Static definition of a creature type loaded from data/core/creatures/*.json Based on CREATURE_SPEC.md

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureInstance
member.summary: Runtime instance of a creature in the world

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager
member.summary: Global manager for creature definitions and runtime instances. Thread-safe for concurrent reads; writes use locks. Follows data-driven principles per CREATURE_SPEC.md and UPDATE_ORDER.md

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.SetWorld(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World)
member.summary: Set world reference (called after World is created)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.LoadDefinitions(System.String)
member.summary: Load creature definitions from data files. Each file is wrapped in try-catch; errors are logged but don't stop loading.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.ValidateDefinition(HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureDefinition)
member.summary: Validate creature definition (basic checks)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.IndexByTags(HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureDefinition)
member.summary: Build tag index for fast queries

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.SpawnCreature(System.String,SadRogue.Primitives.Point,System.Int32,System.String,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Spawn a creature at the specified world position. Returns creature GUID on success, null on failure. TODO: Use Diff-Log instead of direct Chunk write (per UPDATE_ORDER.md)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.GetAllDefinitions
member.summary: Get all creature definitions

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.GetByTag(System.String)
member.summary: Get creature definitions by tag

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.GetDefinition(System.String)
member.summary: Get definition by ID

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.GetInstance(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get instance by GUID

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Creatures.CreatureManager.GetAllInstances
member.summary: Get all instances (creates a snapshot for thread safety)

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Diff.SimulationDiffApplicator
member.summary: Applies core DiffLog operations to the simulation world (v1.1 minimal). Handles MoveCreature, MoveItem, MarkCarried, UnmarkCarried. This runs after systems' Write phase per UPDATE_ORDER.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Diff.SimulationDiffApplicator.LogCallback
member.summary: Optional logging callback (set by App layer to write to fortress_debug.log)

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemDefinition
member.summary: Static definition of an item type loaded from data/core/items/*.json Based on ITEMS_SPEC.md v3

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemInstance
member.summary: Runtime instance of an item in the world

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager
member.summary: Global manager for item definitions and runtime instances. Thread-safe for concurrent reads; writes use locks. Follows data-driven principles per ITEMS_SPEC.md and UPDATE_ORDER.md

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.LogCallback
member.summary: Optional logging callback (set by App layer to write to fortress_debug.log)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.UpdateItemPosition(System.Guid,SadRogue.Primitives.Point,System.Int32,SadRogue.Primitives.Point,System.Int32)
member.summary: Update item position and maintain position index.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.MergeStacksAt(SadRogue.Primitives.Point,System.Int32)
member.summary: Merge stacks at a given world position (post-move consolidation). Current policy: same DefinitionId at same (x,y,z) merge by increasing first instance's StackCount, deleting the redundant instances. Returns number of instances removed.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.SetDependencies(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World,HumanFortress.Core.Content.Registry.ContentRegistry)
member.summary: Set dependencies (called after initialization)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.LoadDefinitions(System.String)
member.summary: Load item definitions from data files. Each file is wrapped in try-catch; errors are logged but don't stop loading.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.ValidateDefinition(HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemDefinition)
member.summary: Validate item definition (basic checks)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.IndexByKind(HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemDefinition)
member.summary: Build kind index for category queries

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.IndexByTags(HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemDefinition)
member.summary: Build tag index for fast queries

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.SpawnItem(System.String,SadRogue.Primitives.Point,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Spawn an item at the specified world position. Returns item GUID on success, null on failure. TODO: Use Diff-Log instead of direct Chunk write (per UPDATE_ORDER.md) TODO: Implement stack merging when spawning stackable items

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.GetAllDefinitions
member.summary: Get all item definitions

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.GetByKind(System.String)
member.summary: Get item definitions by kind (resource/weapon/armor/tool/container/consumable)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.GetAvailableKinds
member.summary: Get available kinds (for UI category display)

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.GetByTag(System.String)
member.summary: Get item definitions by tag

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.GetDefinition(System.String)
member.summary: Get definition by ID

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.GetInstance(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get instance by GUID

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemManager.GetAllInstances
member.summary: Get all instances (creates a snapshot for thread safety)

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemsDiff
member.summary: Immutable diff entry for Items layer operations (L5). Applied during Write phase after Simulation diffs, but before building snapshots.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemsDiffApplicator
member.summary: Applies ItemsDiff operations (AddItem/RemoveItem) during Write phase.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Items.ItemsDiffLog
member.summary: Thread-safe log for ItemsDiff operations per tick.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Jobs.ReservationManager
member.summary: Central reservation manager for items/destinations. v1.1.1 minimal: item-level reservations with TTL and holder. Read-safe; writes happen in Write phase only.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Jobs.ReservationManager.TryReserveItem(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Try reserve an item for a holder until expireTick.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Jobs.ReservationManager.ReleaseItem(System.Guid)
member.summary: Release an item's reservation.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Jobs.ReservationManager.IsItemReserved(System.Guid,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Check if item is reserved at tick.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Jobs.ReservationManager.GetItemReservationsSnapshot
member.summary: Snapshot for UI/debugging.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.HaulDesignation
member.summary: A haul designation created by player input (rectangle at a given Z). Read in the read phase by the hauling system to generate moves. Thread-safe lifetime: created from UI via command; consumed by HaulingSystem.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.HaulingSystem
member.summary: Minimal v1 hauling system: reads haul designations, plans moves, and applies instant relocations. Design for extensibility: later replace instant moves with creature-assigned jobs and path execution.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.HaulingSystem.DequeuePlannedMoves(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IList{HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.HaulingSystem.PlannedMove})
member.summary: Dequeue up to max planned moves for job creation.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.MiningDesignation
member.summary: A mining designation created by player input (rectangle at a given Z). Read in the read phase by the mining system to generate planned digs. Thread-safe lifetime: created from UI via command; consumed by MiningSystem.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.MiningSystem
member.summary: Mining planner: reads mining designations and produces PlannedDig DTOs. Read phase only; no world mutation. Write phase hands off to executor inbox.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.MiningSystem.DequeuePlannedDigs(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IList{HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.MiningSystem.PlannedDig})
member.summary: Dequeue up to max planned digs for job creation.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.OrdersManager
member.summary: Central store for player orders (designations), starting with Haul. Thread-safe for enqueue/dequeue across UI thread and sim thread.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.OrdersManager.EnqueueHaul(SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Enqueue a haul designation for processing.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.OrdersManager.EnqueueMining(SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Enqueue a mining designation for processing.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.OrdersManager.DrainHaulDesignations(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.HaulDesignation},System.Int32)
member.summary: Drain at most maxCount haul designations into the provided list. Returns number drained. Use in the Read phase.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.OrdersManager.GetRecentHauls
member.summary: Get a snapshot of recently created haul designations (for UI/debug).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.OrdersManager.GetActiveHaulsSnapshot
member.summary: Get snapshot of active haul designations (persistent until manually cleared).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.OrdersManager.DrainMiningDesignations(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{HumanFortress.Simulation.Orders.MiningDesignation},System.Int32)
member.summary: Drain mining designations into provided list (Read phase).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Rendering.RenderSnapshot
member.summary: Immutable per-tick snapshot for rendering per RENDERING_SNAPSHOT.md.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Rendering.RenderSnapshotBuilder
member.summary: Builds immutable render snapshots from world state per RENDERING_SNAPSHOT.md.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Rendering.RenderSnapshotBuilder.BuildSnapshot(HumanFortress.Simulation.Rendering.CameraInfo,HumanFortress.Simulation.Rendering.ViewportInfo,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Build snapshot after simulation commits, per section 2.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Rendering.TileRegistry
member.summary: Registry for tile visual data.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData
member.summary: Per-chunk stockpile data including zone shards and item indexing. Thread-safe for reads during Read phase, mutations only in Write phase per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.DirtyGeneration
member.summary: Dirty generation for cache invalidation.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.GetZoneAtCell(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get zones at a specific cell (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.GetShard(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get shard for a zone (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.GetAllShards
member.summary: Get all shards in this chunk (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.GetItemsByTag(System.String)
member.summary: Get items by tag (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.GetItemsInZone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get items in a zone (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.GetLooseItems
member.summary: Get loose items not in any zone (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.CreateOrUpdateShard(System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Create or update a zone shard (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.AddCellsToZone(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Add cells to a zone (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.RemoveCellsFromZone(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Remove cells from a zone (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.DeleteShard(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a zone shard (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.OnItemPlaced(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Update item placement (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.OnItemRemoved(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Update item removal (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.TryReserveSlot(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reserve a slot in a zone (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ChunkStockpileData.ReleaseSlot(System.Int32)
member.summary: Release a reserved slot (Write phase only).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiffOp
member.summary: Diff operations for stockpile system per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md. Follows the Diff-Log pattern from CONCURRENCY_MODEL.md.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff
member.summary: Immutable diff entry for stockpile operations. Generated during Read phase, applied during Write phase.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.Op
member.summary: Operation to perform.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.TargetChunk
member.summary: Target chunk for this operation.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.ZoneId
member.summary: Zone ID for this operation.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.CellIndex
member.summary: Cell index within chunk (-1 if N/A).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.ItemHandle
member.summary: Item handle (0 if N/A).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.Quantity
member.summary: Quantity for operations involving amounts.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.Priority
member.summary: Priority for merge ordering.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.SystemId
member.summary: System that generated this diff.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.LocalSeq
member.summary: Local sequence number for stable ordering.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.JobId
member.summary: Job ID for reservation tracking.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.Data
member.summary: Additional data for specific operations.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff.GetSortKey
member.summary: Create a deterministic sort key for merge ordering. Per STOCKPILE_SPEC: cellIndex → priority(desc) → op → zoneId → itemHandle → systemId → localSeq

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiffApplicator
member.summary: Applies stockpile diffs during Write phase. Per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md section 7: deterministic merge and atomic application.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiffApplicator.ApplyDiffs(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk,System.Collections.Generic.List{HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff})
member.summary: Apply a batch of stockpile diffs to a chunk. Called during Write phase only.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiffApplicator.ApplyDiff(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk,HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileDiff)
member.summary: Apply a single diff to a chunk.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileFilter
member.summary: Filter determining which items a stockpile zone accepts. Data-driven per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileFilter.Mode
member.summary: Filter mode (whitelist or blacklist).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileFilter.Tags
member.summary: Item tags to filter by.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileFilter.ItemIds
member.summary: Specific item IDs to filter by.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileFilter.Materials
member.summary: Material IDs to filter by.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileFilter.Accepts(HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ItemStackRef,HumanFortress.Core.Content.ContentRegistry)
member.summary: Check if this filter accepts the given item.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileFilter.FromPreset(HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpilePreset)
member.summary: Create a filter from a preset definition.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.FilterMode
member.summary: Filter mode for stockpile zones.

member.name: F:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.FilterMode.Whitelist
member.summary: Only accept items matching the filter criteria.

member.name: F:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.FilterMode.Blacklist
member.summary: Accept all items except those matching the filter criteria.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpilePreset
member.summary: Stockpile preset loaded from JSON.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ItemDefinition
member.summary: Temporary item definition placeholder. TODO: Replace with actual item system integration.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ItemStackRef
member.summary: Reference to an item stack with stockpile-related properties.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ItemStackRef.Handle
member.summary: Unique handle for this item stack.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ItemStackRef.LastZoneId
member.summary: Last zone this item was in (for stickiness).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ItemStackRef.PlacedTick
member.summary: Tick when this item was placed (for dwell time).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ItemStackRef.Reserved
member.summary: Whether this item is reserved by a haul job.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ItemStackRef.ReservedByJobId
member.summary: Job that has reserved this item.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker
member.summary: Single arbitration point for matching stockpile pull requests with available items. Per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md section 3: Broker ensures deterministic matching and prevents ping-pong.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.GenerateHaulJobs(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Main broker entry point called during Read phase. Collects requests and items, performs matching, outputs haul job diffs.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.CollectPullRequests
member.summary: Collect pull requests from all active chunks.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.GenerateChunkPullRequests(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk)
member.summary: Generate pull requests for a single chunk.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.CollectAvailableItems(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Collect available items from all chunks.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.CollectChunkItems(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Collect available items from a single chunk.
Match pull requests to available items using deterministic scoring.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.CalculateIntegerScore(HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.AvailableItem,HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.PullRequest,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Calculate integer score for item-zone matching. Per STOCKPILE_SPEC section 4.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.ConvertToHaulJobDiffs(System.Collections.Generic.List{HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.HaulJob})
member.summary: Convert matched haul jobs to diffs.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.PullRequest
member.summary: Pull request from a zone.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.AvailableItem
member.summary: Available item for hauling.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileHaulingBroker.HaulJob
member.summary: Haul job to be created.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileTuning
member.summary: Tuning parameters for stockpile system. Loaded from tuning.stockpile.json per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileManager
member.summary: Global manager for stockpile zones. Maintains zone definitions and coordinates with chunks.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileManager.CreateZone(System.String,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Create a new stockpile zone.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileManager.GetZone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a zone by ID (thread-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileManager.GetAllZones
member.summary: Get all zones (thread-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileManager.DeleteZone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a zone.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileManager.UpdateZone(System.Int32,System.Action{HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone})
member.summary: Update zone configuration.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessageType
member.summary: Message types for cross-chunk stockpile coordination. Per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md section 6.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage
member.summary: Cross-chunk message for stockpile operations. Sent via Actor mailbox per CONCURRENCY_MODEL.md.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.Type
member.summary: Message type.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.ZoneId
member.summary: Zone ID this message relates to.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.ItemHandle
member.summary: Item handle for haul operations.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.Quantity
member.summary: Quantity being hauled.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.SourceChunk
member.summary: Source chunk for the operation.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.DestChunk
member.summary: Destination chunk for the operation.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.CellIndex
member.summary: Cell index at destination.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.JobId
member.summary: Job ID for tracking.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.LocalSeq
member.summary: Local sequence for deterministic ordering.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.HaulJobAssigned(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a haul job assigned message.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.HaulJobComplete(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a haul job complete message.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.HaulJobCancelled(System.Int32,System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a haul job cancelled message.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileMessage.GetDrainSortKey(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Get deterministic sort key for mailbox draining. Per CONCURRENCY_MODEL: tick → sourceChunk.Hash → localSeq

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone
member.summary: Represents a stockpile zone that can span multiple chunks. Global definition per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.ZoneId
member.summary: Unique zone identifier.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.Name
member.summary: Display name for the zone.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.HomeChunk
member.summary: Home chunk where the zone was created (owns global properties).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.Filter
member.summary: Filter determining which items this zone accepts.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.Priority
member.summary: Priority level (0=Low, 1=Normal, 2=High, 3=Critical).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.TargetStacks
member.summary: Target number of stacks to maintain.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.HysteresisLow
member.summary: Start pulling items when stack count falls below this threshold.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.HysteresisHigh
member.summary: Stop pulling items when stack count exceeds this threshold.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.Generation
member.summary: Generation counter, incremented on any configuration change.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.CreatedTick
member.summary: Tick when this zone was created.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.MemberChunks
member.summary: Chunks that contain cells belonging to this zone (immutable after creation).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.UpdateMemberChunks(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey})
member.summary: Update member chunks when cells are added/removed.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.StockpileZone.IncrementGeneration
member.summary: Increment generation when configuration changes.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZonePriority
member.summary: Priority levels for stockpile zones.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard
member.summary: Per-chunk fragment of a stockpile zone. Maintains local member cells and capacity tracking per STOCKPILE_SPEC.md.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.ZoneId
member.summary: Zone ID this shard belongs to.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.ChunkKey
member.summary: Chunk this shard is in.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.MemberCells
member.summary: Member cells in this chunk (bitset for 32x32=1024 cells).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.Capacity
member.summary: Number of cells that can hold items.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.UsedSlots
member.summary: Number of cells currently occupied.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.ReservedSlots
member.summary: Number of cells reserved for incoming items.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.IncomingCount
member.summary: Number of items in transit to this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.AddCells(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Add cells to this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.RemoveCells(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Remove cells from this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.ContainsCell(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check if a cell is part of this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.TryReserveSlot
member.summary: Reserve a slot for an incoming item.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.ReleaseSlot
member.summary: Release a reserved slot.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.OccupySlot
member.summary: Mark a slot as occupied.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.FreeSlot
member.summary: Mark a slot as free.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.UpdateIncoming(System.Int32)
member.summary: Update incoming count.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.GetFillRatio
member.summary: Get fill ratio for this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Stockpile.ZoneShard.GetAvailableCapacity
member.summary: Get available capacity.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps
member.summary: Canonical terrain bit operations per TILES_MATERIALS_ARCHITECTURE.md. This is the single source of truth for TerrainBits encoding/decoding.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.GetKind(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Extract TerrainKind from TerrainBits (bits 0-3).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.IsNatural(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Check if terrain is natural (bit 6).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.IsModifiable(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Check if terrain is modifiable (bit 6).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.CreateTerrainBits(HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainKind,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create TerrainBits from components (v2).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.SetKind(System.UInt16,HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainKind)
member.summary: Modify terrain kind while preserving other bits.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.SetNatural(System.UInt16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set natural flag.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.SetModifiable(System.UInt16,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set modifiable flag.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.GetDirectionOffset(System.Byte)
member.summary: Get direction offsets for ramp navigation. Direction encoding: 0=N, 1=NE, 2=E, 3=SE, 4=S, 5=SW, 6=W, 7=NW.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.CanAscendRamp(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Byte)
member.summary: Check if approach direction is valid for ascending a ramp (helper used in UI/tests).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainBitOps.GetRampDestination(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Byte)
member.summary: Get destination position when ascending a ramp.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TileBase
member.summary: Base tile structure per TILE_SPEC.md. Size: 10 bytes (may be padded by CLR). Immutable for thread safety - use atomic replacement for updates.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TileBase.WithTerrain(System.UInt16)
member.summary: Create a modified copy with new terrain bits.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TileBase.WithFluid(System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Create a modified copy with new fluid.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TerrainKind
member.summary: Terrain types per TILE_SPEC.md.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.RampDirection
member.summary: Ramp directions helper enum retained for offsets.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk
member.summary: Fixed-size chunk of tiles per CHUNK_AND_DATA_LAYOUT.md. Default 32x32 cells per Z-level.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.GetTile(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get tile at local coordinates. Thread-safe for reads.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.SetTile(System.Int32,System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TileBase,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Set tile at local coordinates. Must be called only during Write phase.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.GetFurniture(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get furniture at position. Thread-safe.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.PlaceFurniture(System.Int32,System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.FurnitureRef,System.Boolean,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Place furniture. Must be called only during Write phase.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.GetTilesCopy
member.summary: Get all tiles for batch operations. Creates a copy for thread safety.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.LocalIndex(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert local coordinates to index.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.IndexToLocal(System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert index to local coordinates.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.GetStockpileData
member.summary: Get stockpile data for this chunk. Thread-safe for reads.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.EnsureStockpileData
member.summary: Initialize stockpile data if not present. Write phase only.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.GetZoneData
member.summary: Get zone data for this chunk. Thread-safe for reads.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.Chunk.EnsureZoneData
member.summary: Initialize zone data if not present. Write phase only.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey
member.summary: Unique chunk identifier.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.FurnitureCell
member.summary: L2 overlay - furniture/constructions.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.FurnitureRef
member.summary: Reference to furniture instance.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.FieldCell
member.summary: L4 overlay - fields (gases/decals).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ItemStackRef
member.summary: L5 overlay - item stacks.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkLifecycleManager
member.summary: Manages chunk lifecycle and LOD transitions per SIM_LOD_POLICY.md.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkLifecycleManager.UpdateLODLevels(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Update LOD levels based on camera and heat per section 1.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkLifecycleManager.AddHeat(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Add heat to a chunk (combat, fire, etc).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkLifecycleManager.PinChunk(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.PinReason)
member.summary: Pin a chunk for a reason (UI focus, etc).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkLifecycleManager.UnpinChunk(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.PinReason)
member.summary: Unpin a chunk.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.LODLevel
member.summary: LOD levels per SIM_LOD_POLICY.md section 0.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.PinReason
member.summary: Reasons to pin a chunk at higher LOD.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World
member.summary: World manager handling chunks and LOD per SIM_LOD_POLICY.md. Fortress size: N×N chunks, N ∈ [2..8]; chunk = 32×32×Z tiles.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.SizeInChunks
member.summary: Size of the world in chunks (N for N×N).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.SizeInTiles
member.summary: Size of the world in tiles.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.MaxZ
member.summary: Maximum Z level.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.GetOrCreateChunk(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Get or create a chunk.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.GetChunk(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Get chunk if it exists.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.GetTile(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get tile at world coordinates.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.SetTile(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.Tiles.TileBase,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Set tile at world coordinates. Must be called only during Write phase.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.IsValidPosition(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Check if position is valid.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.GetAllChunks
member.summary: Get all chunks in the world.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.GetChunkAt(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get chunk at chunk coordinates.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.GetActiveChunks
member.summary: Get all active chunks (L0/L1).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.MarkChunkDirty(HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Mark chunk as dirty for navigation rebuild.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.GetAndClearDirtyChunks
member.summary: Get and clear all dirty chunks for navigation rebuild.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.UpdateLOD(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Update LOD levels based on player focus per SIM_LOD_POLICY.md.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.World.GetEdgeBandChunks
member.summary: Get chunks that need edge-band checking for incidents.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.World.EdgeBand
member.summary: Edge band directions for incident spawning.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData
member.summary: Per-chunk zone data including zone shards per ZONE_SPEC.md §4.3. Thread-safe for reads during Read phase, mutations only in Write phase.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.DirtyGeneration
member.summary: Dirty generation for cache invalidation.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.GetZoneAtCell(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get zone ID at a specific cell (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.GetShard(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get shard for a zone (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.GetAllShards
member.summary: Get all shards in this chunk (Read-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.HasZone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check if zone has any cells in this chunk.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.CreateOrUpdateShard(System.Int32,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey)
member.summary: Create or update a zone shard (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.AddCellsToZone(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Add cells to a zone (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.RemoveCellsFromZone(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Remove cells from a zone (Write phase only).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ChunkZoneData.DeleteShard(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a zone shard (Write phase only).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneCoordinator
member.summary: Coordinator for zone operations at the World level. Provides high-level methods for zone creation, deletion, and cell management.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneCoordinator.Manager
member.summary: Access to the underlying ZoneManager.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneCoordinator.CreateZoneFromRect(System.String,System.String,SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Int32,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Create a zone from a world-space rectangle at a given Z level.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneCoordinator.AddCellsToZone(System.Int32,SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add cells from a rectangle to an existing zone.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneCoordinator.RemoveCellsFromZone(System.Int32,SadRogue.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove cells from a rectangle from an existing zone.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneCoordinator.DeleteZone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a zone entirely, removing it from all chunks.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneCoordinator.GetZoneAtPosition(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get zone ID at a specific world position.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneDefinition
member.summary: Content-driven zone definition loaded from zones.json per ZONE_SPEC.md §4.1. Immutable template for creating zone instances.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneDefinition.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier (e.g., "bedroom", "assembly", "lumbering").

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneDefinition.Category
member.summary: Category: production, civil, public, military, management.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneDefinition.DisplayName
member.summary: Display name for UI.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneDefinition.UiHints
member.summary: UI hints for rendering.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneDefinition.DefaultPolicies
member.summary: Default policies for this zone type.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneDefinition.Notes
member.summary: Optional notes/description.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneUiHints
member.summary: UI hints for zone visualization.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneUiHints.Glyph
member.summary: Glyph character for display.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneUiHints.Color
member.summary: Color in hex format (e.g., "#FFD700").

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneUiHints.Keybind
member.summary: Keybind hint (e.g., "Z", "X").

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZonePolicies
member.summary: Zone policies (defaults from definition, can be overridden per instance).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZonePolicies.NavCostMode
member.summary: Navigation cost mode: "none" or "restricted".

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZonePolicies.AllowsActions
member.summary: List of allowed action types (future use).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance
member.summary: Runtime zone instance per ZONE_SPEC.md §4.2. Represents a placed zone that can span multiple chunks.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.ZoneId
member.summary: Unique zone instance identifier.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.DefId
member.summary: Definition ID (e.g., "bedroom", "assembly").

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.Name
member.summary: User-assigned name.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.Priority
member.summary: Priority level (0=Low, 1=Normal, 2=High, 3=Critical). Used for tie-breaking when multiple zones overlap.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.Subtype
member.summary: Subtype: "auto", "indoor", "outdoor" (for Assembly auto-naming, deferred in v1).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.ZMode
member.summary: Z-level mode: "single" (v1), "range" (future).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.HomeChunk
member.summary: Home chunk where the zone was created (owns global properties).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.MemberChunks
member.summary: Chunks that contain cells belonging to this zone.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.TotalCells
member.summary: Total number of member cells across all chunks.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.Policies
member.summary: Optional policy overrides.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.Enabled
member.summary: Zone enabled/disabled state.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.Generation
member.summary: Generation counter, incremented on any configuration change.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.CreatedTick
member.summary: Tick when this zone was created.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.UpdateMemberChunks(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey})
member.summary: Update member chunks when cells are added/removed.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance.IncrementGeneration
member.summary: Increment generation when configuration changes.

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager
member.summary: Global manager for zone instances per ZONE_SPEC.md. Maintains zone definitions and runtime instances. Thread-safe for reads during Read phase.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.RegisterDefinition(HumanFortress.Core.Content.ZoneDefinitionData)
member.summary: Register a zone definition from content data.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.GetDefinition(System.String)
member.summary: Get zone definition by ID.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.GetAllDefinitions
member.summary: Get all zone definitions.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.CreateZone(System.String,System.String,HumanFortress.Simulation.World.ChunkKey,System.UInt64)
member.summary: Create a new zone instance.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.GetZone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a zone by ID (thread-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.GetAllZones
member.summary: Get all zones (thread-safe).

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.GetZonesByCategory(System.String)
member.summary: Get zones by category.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.DeleteZone(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a zone.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.UpdateZone(System.Int32,System.Action{HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneInstance})
member.summary: Update zone configuration.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneManager.Clear
member.summary: Clear all zones (for testing/reset).

member.name: T:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard
member.summary: Per-chunk fragment of a zone per ZONE_SPEC.md §4.3. Maintains local member cells and candidate furniture caches.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard.ZoneId
member.summary: Zone ID this shard belongs to.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard.ChunkKey
member.summary: Chunk this shard is in.

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard.MemberCells
member.summary: Member cells in this chunk (bitset for 32x32=1024 cells).

member.name: P:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard.CellCount
member.summary: Number of member cells in this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard.AddCells(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Add cells to this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard.RemoveCells(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Remove cells from this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard.ContainsCell(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check if a cell is part of this shard.

member.name: M:HumanFortress.Simulation.Zones.ZoneShard.Clear
member.summary: Clear all cells.
